name: Shrimp Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except shrimp in the chicken stock.
2. Bring to a boil and then lower the heat.
3. Cover and cook for 45 minutes.
4. Add shrimp and simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
You may wish to experiment with the amount of wine you use; two cups in the pot may be too much for some tastes. If needed, reserve the remaining wine before serving.
